featured.title: Molt
featured.summary: AOT compiler for a practical subset of Python. Produces small, fast native and WebAssembly binaries with broad stdlib and C extension compatibility.

latest.title: Crafted Action Pages
latest.summary: Campaign action page engine with FEC/state disclaimer compliance, geo-personalized donation asks, and edge A/B testing.

latest.title: Reproq
latest.summary: Django 6.0 task queue with Postgres-native queueing and a high-performance Go execution engine.

latest.title: Data for Public Education
latest.summary: Texas public school data platform: teadata (Python library on PyPI), teadata-app (Django web application), and teadata-mcp (MCP server with React UI). Three repos, one mission.
latest.stack: Django, Python, React, TypeScript, MCP, PostgreSQL

latest.title: Texas Inflation Calculator
latest.summary: Static Vue.js calculator comparing Texas buying power over time using Comptroller CPI data.

latest.title: Respect Campaign Map
latest.summary: Interactive JavaScript map visualizing district-level campaign data for Texas AFT's statewide education advocacy campaign.

latest.title: Travis County Voter Data
latest.summary: Python voter data API with heatmap generation, jurisdictional analysis, and a web interface for Travis County election data.

latest.title: TCDP Donor Identification
latest.summary: Flask application for matching campaign donors to the voter file by phone number for the Travis County Democratic Party.

latest.title: Fiscal Impact of Charter School Expansion
latest.summary: Analysis of $3.6 billion in revenue losses across 325+ Texas public school districts due to charter school expansion, with district-level breakdowns.
